CONTENT.Career: Talbi was with Royale Union Tubize-Braine until 2015 when he joined Club Brugge. In July 2022 Talbi signed a three-year professional contract with Club Brugge into 2025. He started the 2022-23 season playing for Club NXT, in the Challenger Pro League, Belgian football’s second division. He scored on his professional debut against SL16 FC in August 2022, and again the following week against Lierse Kempenzonen.In February 2023 Talbi began training as part of the first team squad of Club Brugge.  This was reported as a reward for his playing form. On 18 March 23, he made his league debut for Club Brugge when he came on as a second half substitute against KV Kortrijk.
CONTENT.External links: Chemsdine Talbi at the Club Brugge KN websiteChemsdine Talbi – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.International career: Born in Belgium, Talbi is of Moroccan descent. He scored for Belgium at the 2022 UEFA European Under-17 Championship. He was called up to the Belgian U18s national team led by Wesley Sonck and on 24 March, 2023 scored against the England national under-18 football team in a 3-0 victory.

SUMMARY: Chemsdine Talbi (born 9 May 2005) is a Belgian football player for Club Brugge and the Belgium national under-18 football team.
